hero.title: Designing
hero.descriptionEnd: A developer of high-performance and intuitive mobile applications, with expertise in Android and Kotlin Multiplatform.

about.title: Expertise & Vision
about.desc1: Passionate mobile developer, I specialize in designing Android and multiplatform applications with Kotlin Multiplatform. My approach combines robust architecture, careful user experience, and optimal performance.
about.desc2: I support startups and companies in creating mobile products that make a difference, from MVP to large-scale applications.

services.title: My Services
services.subtitle: Clear services, adapted to each stage of your mobile project.

service1.title: Mobile App Development (Android & KMP)
service1.desc: Complete design and development of your mobile application, from idea to production on stores.

service2.title: Bug fixing
service2.desc: Diagnosis and resolution of bugs on your existing application. Optimization of performance and stability.

service3.title: Maintenance & upgrades
service3.desc: Continuous support to evolve your application: new features, updates, refactoring.

thurii.desc: Award-winning hiking application with real-time GPS tracking and route visualization.

alea.desc: Project currently under development. Coming very soon to Android and iOS stores.

plumi.desc: Project currently under development. Coming very soon to Android and iOS stores.

freelance.desc:
Mobile developer specialized in Android (Jetpack Compose) and Kotlin Multiplatform (Jetpack Compose / SwiftUI).

My goal: to create fluid, robust and maintainable mobile experiences, relying on clean architectures and smooth integration between Android and iOS thanks to Kotlin Multiplatform.

sogelink.desc:
Participation in the development of an innovative mobile application intended for construction professionals, as part of a strategic project aimed at consolidating Sogelink's leading position on the market.

Design and development in Kotlin Multiplatform with Jetpack Compose (Android) and SwiftUI (iOS), in compliance with software architecture best practices.

thurii.desc:
Development of an Android application intended for hiking enthusiasts, allowing real-time GPS tracking and visualization of routes.

Full implementation in Kotlin, integration of GPS geolocation, route tracing and recording, permission management, and implementation of a notification system.

Successful publication on the Google Play Store with more than 50 active users. Awarded as best student project at Epitech Lyon for its technical quality and innovation.

contact.title: Let's work together
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? Let's talk about it.
